title: Coinbase, Circle underperform Big Tech as crypto stock slump deepens
summary: Coinbase and Circle have posted steeper losses than Oracle, Netflix and Salesforce, highlighting the widening gap between crypto equities and the broader market.

title: SecondFi targets two-week recovery after Cardano wallet exploit
summary: SecondFi says it has completed forensic investigations, taken a final balance snapshot and is preparing to return assets.

title: Aid Groups Flock to Venezuela In Search-and-Rescue Frenzy
summary: Two of the US military ships used in a blockade meant to pressure Nicolás Maduro have headed back toward Venezuela, this time with rescue teams, equipment and medical aid after devastating twin earthquakes struck the country this week.
